summary: Task 017 appears complete in substance. The current implementation triggers note enrichment automatically on create and update, runs the Mina request after the save response path, records pending/ready/failed state plus generated summary/tags, exposes retry on failure, and surfaces generated note metadata in the editor and owner note lists/search/tag views. The provided deterministic checks show both `npm run verify` and `npm run test:e2e -- --grep @ai-real` passing against the current task slice, and the inspected E2E coverage includes both the real-endpoint success journey and a configured-endpoint timeout/failure journey.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Saving a note triggers automatic enrichment on create and update.
AI failure does not block note save and leaves a visible failed state with retry.
Generated note summary/tags appear in the documented owner note surfaces.
`npm run verify` passed in the deterministic check summary.
`npm run test:e2e -- --grep @ai-real` passed for the real note-enrichment journey.
